mano_cua.result_summary: playground仅渲染裸PDF无搜索/高亮UI控件，文本高亮是编程API（highlight prop）非可视化功能，mano-cua无法通过GUI测试
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page shows only bare PDF document without any visible UI controls for text highlight or search. The VuePDF playground App.vue only uses basic <VuePDF :pdf> without highlight props.
